name: PT Asuransi Ramayana Tbk
summary: PT Asuransi Ramayana Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a general insurance company in Indonesia. The company operates through two segments, General Insurance and Rental of Office Buildings. It offers fire, marine cargo, motor vehicle, marine hull, aviation, engineering, bond, and miscellaneous insurance products. The company also engages in building and vehicle rental activities. PT Asuransi Ramayana Tbk was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
